answer: Medical-use cannabis packages must include product identity, cannabinoid content, required health warnings, and batch tracking identifiers before retail transfer.
Adult-use labels must clearly display THC potency, universal symbol, net weight, licensee information, and required poison control warning language.
Licensees must maintain inventory records and transfer events in the state track-and-trace system for each package movement and adjustment.
Adults 21+ may possess up to the state-allowed retail amount; local rules can add restrictions, so operators should verify municipal requirements before advising customers.
